meaning: n.授权,正当理由,根据,证明,凭证,委任状,批准,许可证vt.保证,辩解,担保,批准,使有正当理由
examples: There is no warrant for such criticism.
They issued a warrant for her arrest.
The President signed the death warrant.
The Albuquerque agents filed their warrant request with the Justice Department in July 1997.
Police said a search warrant had been obtained but would not provide details about the search.
